news.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
news.summary: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.

news.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
news.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

news.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
news.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

news.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
news.summary: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. news.title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
news.summary: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.

news.title: PlayStation’s age-gating restrictions are coming to UK consoles
news.summary: Sony is starting to comply with the UK's Online Safety Act by notifying PlayStation players of its age verification requirements today. news.title: Dyson’s back with a travel-size Supersonic hairdryer
news.summary: Ten years ago, Dyson kicked off the hair gadget arms race with its $400 Supersonic hairdryer. Today, it's back with a slightly smaller and cheaper travel-size version. news.title: Tim Cook will still be Apple’s Trump whisperer
news.summary: Though Tim Cook is shedding his CEO title for the role of Apple's executive chairman, it appears he'll keep one of his most important duties: that of the company's Trump whisperer. news.title: Pentagon pulls the plug on one of the military's most troubled space programs
news.summary: Problems with the ground system would have "put current GPS military and civilian capabilities at risk."

news.title: John Ternus will replace Tim Cook as Apple CEO
news.summary: Cook will be executive chairman, but will no longer run the company day to day.

news.title: Absurd study suggests eating fruits and vegetables leads to cancer
news.summary: Experts point out a series of flaws, including small size and no control group.

news.summary: Importers can now request refunds, two months after Trump's Supreme Court loss.

news.title: A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
news.summary: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

news.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Is Stepping Down
news.summary: John Ternus, the company’s senior vice president of hardware engineering, will replace Cook as CEO on September 1. Cook will stay on as executive chairman.
